name: Kim
message: My kids and I live in VA. We would love to come say hi and show you some support when you get through to Shenandoah! Give us a list if you need anything! And amazing choice for an adventure! I’m doing this when I retire in 6 years!

name: Alexis
message: You got this ! You should be so proud of yourself, to take on such a challenge.

name: Paul C
message: Go Laura, go! Sending you strength and love.
